transcript:
Speaker A (AI): Where are you?
Speaker B (Man): I go to home?
Speaker A (AI): You mean, "I am going home."
Speaker B (Man): Yes, I am going home. I am very hurry.
Speaker A (AI): "I am in a hurry" is the correct way.
Speaker B (Man): Okay, I am in a hurry. रुको तुम इंग्लिश इतनी आसानी से सिखा रहे हो तुम हो कौन? [Wait, you are teaching English so easily, who are you?]
Speaker A (AI): मैं MySivi की AI teacher हूँ जो तुम्हें अपनी इंग्लिश इम्प्रूव और फ्लूएंट करने में मदद करेगी। [I am MySivi's AI teacher who will help you improve and make your English fluent.]
Speaker B (Man): Okay, but have no moneys.
Speaker A (AI): You mean "I have no money", but don't worry. सिर्फ ₹1 में इसका ट्रायल लेके देखो और सिर्फ 15 दिन रेगुलर प्रैक्टिस करो और तुम्हें अपने कॉन्फिडेंस में फर्क नजर आएगा। [You mean "I have no money", but don't worry. Take its trial for just ₹1 and practice regularly for just 15 days, and you will see a difference in your confidence.]
Speaker B (Man): सच में? मैं अभी डाउनलोड करता हूँ। [Really? I will download it right now.]

summary: A driver practices English with an AI avatar that corrects his grammar in real-time. The AI introduces herself as MySivi's teacher and offers a trial for just ₹1 to boost his confidence in 15 days. Convinced, the driver immediately downloads the app.
